title: The Two Brewers Street Party
description: Annual Pride street party on Clapham High Street outside the Two Brewers. Headline performances from Booty Luv and Adam Rickitt, full drag lineup including Victoria Scone, Catrin Feelings, Marsha Mallow, Lola Lasagne, and many more. Hosted by Miss Penny. £12 entry, cards only on the door — no advance tickets, pay on entry.
